description: Official LaTeX abstract template for the Journée Régionale des Doctorants en Automatique (JRDA) 2022. Provides a one-page abstract format with a branded logo header, multi-author/multi-affiliation blocks via authblk with a corresponding-author footer, numbered sections in sans-serif Helvetica, a dedicated figure-caption/listing style, and natbib citations, based on a custom JRDA document class shared with the IAHR Young Professionals Network lineage.
